name: wf-schema-mismatch
prompt: Read config-reader-buggy.rkt. The function `resolve-model` is supposed to handle model names in "provider/model" format (e.g. "openai/gpt-4o") but always returns #f for compound names. Fix it so it correctly splits the name, looks up the provider, and returns the provider config. Also fix `merge-configs` which currently lets global override project (it should be the opposite — project overrides global).
description: Pattern 4: Fix schema/format mismatch between producer and consumer
